Korean steels Japanese steel grading -> SNB Grades -> SNB22-3 SNB22-3 Chemical composition, standards and properties Grade : SNB22-3 Classification: Structural steel Chromium molybdenum steel Standards: JIS G 4108 : Alloy steel bars for special application bolting materials Applications: Rolled or forget alloy steel bars to be used for the manufacture of the bolts, stud bolts, washers, nuts and other for nuclear reactors and other special uses.
